name: python3-inflect
title: python3-inflect
summary: Generate plurals, singular nouns, ordinals, indefinite articles (Python 3)
description:
Generate plurals, singular nouns, ordinals, indefinite articles (Python 3)
The inflect Python module correctly generates plurals, singular nouns,
ordinals and indefinite articles. It can also convert numbers to words.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of this module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-inflect because Generate plurals, singular nouns, ordinals, indefinite articles (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-inflect as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-inflect with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-inflect --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
